ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically recalculate dice columns whenever the file is saved. Disable if you want to trigger fills manually.
ast.target: 每当文件保存时自动重新计算骰子列。如果您希望手动触发填充，请禁用此选项。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No Markdown table found at cursor.
ast.target: 在光标处未找到 Markdown 表格。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No dice tables found in this file.
ast.target: 在此文件中未找到骰子表格。

ast.source: Fill dice column in table at cursor
ast.target: 填充光标处表格的骰子列

ast.name: name
ast.source: Fill all dice columns in this file
ast.target: 填充此文件中的所有骰子列
